name: getFileContent
description: Fetch the raw text content of a previously generated file by its URL. Use this only for files that were previously created through getFile and are available as getFile URLs. Do not use this as a general local filesystem reader; for explicit local paths, use getShell instead. Typical flow: read a prior getFile URL, apply the change, then write it back with getFile (overwrite: true). Binary files (images, PDFs, ZIPs) are rejected. Maximum file size: 512 KB.

url.description: Absolute http/https URL of the file to read. Must point to a text file (source code, markdown, JSON, etc.).
